blocks.content: what am i supposed to do j
go to the steps next thursday. which you're already doing. then after the steps TALK TO HER. like an actual conversation where you say what you're actually thinking
no you were answering her questions. that's not the same thing. when's the last time you asked HER something
He was right. I'd been responding to everything she said and not once had I led with something of my own.
ok. good. ask her something real next thursday. not about class. not about the bus. something you actually want to know.
bruh I don't know she's YOUR girl. what do you actually want to know about her
I sat with that for a while. I didn't answer it on AIM. But I sat with it.
